mined_facts.MDT (after 6 week: Decision: Descending colon polyp – well differentiated adenocarcinoma  Other polyps – tubular adenoma with low grade dysplasia   CT TAP: fullness in the descending colon with no evidence of extramural spread. No lymphadenopathy. No metastases.   Outcome To see consultant next week to discuss possible surgery  Repeat colonoscopy with tattoo
